title: Verify the presence of the 'Help/Info' page title
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Help/Info' page. | Verify that the title 'Help/Info' is displayed at the top of the screen.
expected_result: The title 'Help/Info' is displayed at the top of the screen.

title: Navigate through the table of contents
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Help/Info' page. | Scroll through the table of contents and verify that all sections are accessible. | Click on each section to ensure it navigates to the correct content.
expected_result: All sections in the table of contents are accessible and navigate to the correct content.

title: Verify the presence of the 'OK' button
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Help/Info' page. | Verify that the 'OK' button is present at the bottom of the screen.
expected_result: The 'OK' button is present at the bottom of the screen.

title: Click on the 'OK' button
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Help/Info' page. | Click on the 'OK' button at the bottom of the screen.
expected_result: The 'Help/Info' page should remain open after clicking the 'OK' button.

title: Check for accessibility features
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Help/Info' page. | Perform a screen reader test to ensure all elements are accessible.
expected_result: All elements on the 'Help/Info' page are accessible and can be read by a screen reader.

title: Check for usability
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Help/Info' page. | Perform a usability test to ensure the page is easy to navigate and understand.
expected_result: The 'Help/Info' page is easy to navigate and understand.

title: Check for data persistence
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Help/Info' page. | Close the app and reopen it to verify that the 'Help/Info' page remains accessible.
expected_result: The 'Help/Info' page remains accessible after closing and reopening the app.
